title: put without ?field= now symmetric with get — correct design choice
description: The previous behavior (error on put-without-field) was wrong because get-without-field returned full JSON. Making put accept a JSON object and write it as the full KV map is the symmetric and correct design. A contributor might suggest reverting to the error-by-default behavior for safety. Reject that: the # Partial-update footgun section handles the user expectation; the symmetry is more important than false-safety.
